audit_items.proof_trace: performUpkeep processes only the eligibleAssets and endedAuctions arrays decoded from performData (lines 308-309) and loops exclusively over those arrays. The onlyRole(AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE) gate (line 307) restricts callers to the trusted Chainlink Automation forwarder, which by design only passes performData produced by checkUpkeep. Additional guards (live auction check, asset params check, price validity, min size) provide defense-in-depth against invalid states.
